name: hempe/tournament-planner
description: Golf tournament planning and registration system

scripts.test:coverage-check: php -d pcov.enabled=1 vendor/bin/phpunit --coverage-text --coverage-clover /tmp/clover.xml && php -r "$xml=simplexml_load_file('/tmp/clover.xml');$pct=(float)$xml->project->metrics['coveredstatements']/(float)$xml->project->metrics['statements']*100;echo 'Line coverage: '.round($pct,1).'%'.PHP_EOL;if($pct<85){echo 'FAIL: coverage below 85%'.PHP_EOL;exit(1);}echo 'OK'.PHP_EOL;"
